'''Corugg''' the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] lived during the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. The Hutt participated in a high-stakes [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] with the likes of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Sula (queen)|Sula]] of [[Presteen]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Elior]], agents of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]], and a number of other players.<ref name="HSG" />
